revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{神社| 名称=八幡神社| 所在地=岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣1| 祭神=[[応神天皇]]| 社格=| 例祭=10月10日| 創建=不明| 画像=| }} '''...'
revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=八幡神社| 所在地=岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣1| 祭神=[[応神天皇]]| 社格=| 例祭=10月10日| 創建=不明| 画像=| }}
'''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[美濃路]]沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。
[[美濃国]]安八郡[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は[[白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|白鬚神社]] 。
元々の位置は現在地の北（[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]河川敷）であり、[[本巣郡]]と安八郡の境に存在したという。
== 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] **[[小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|説経節をぐり]]によると、[[小栗判官]]が[[現人神]]として祀られているという。
== 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩5分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65 墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65 墨俣」行き
== 関連項目 == *[[結神社]] :照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。
{{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしやすのまた}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

== 関連項目 == *[[結神社]] *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]]

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sunomata Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

revision.comment: 14 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2015年3月19日 (木) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=八幡神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|墨俣町・八幡神社]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[応神天皇]] | 社格=[[式内社]]論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[美濃路]]沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 [[美濃国]]安八郡[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は[[白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|白鬚神社]] 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]河川敷）であり、[[本巣郡]]と安八郡の境に存在したという。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] **[[小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|説経節をぐり]]によると、[[小栗判官]]が[[現人神]]として祀られているという。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 関連項目 == *[[結神社]] *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

page|ja|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|version=107307049|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2015年3月19日 (木) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=八幡神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|墨俣町・八幡神社]]
拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[応神天皇]] | 社格=[[式内社]]論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[美濃路]]沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 [[美濃国]]安八郡[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は[[白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|白鬚神社]] 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]河川敷）であり、[[本巣郡]]と安八郡の境に存在したという。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] **[[小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|説経節をぐり]]によると、[[小栗判官]]が[[現人神]]として祀られているという。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 関連項目 == *[[結神社]] *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] ==End Japanese==

拝殿 | 所在地=[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=[[応神天皇]] | 社格=[[式内社]]論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[大垣市]]（旧[[安八郡]][[墨俣町]]）にある[[神社]]。[[美濃路]]沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 [[美濃国]]安八郡[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は[[白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|白鬚神社]] 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（[[犀川 (岐阜県)|犀川]]河川敷）であり、[[本巣郡]]と安八郡の境に存在したという。 == 祭神 == *[[応神天皇]] **[[小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|説経節をぐり]]によると、[[小栗判官]]が[[現人神]]として祀られているという。 == 交通機関 == *[[名阪近鉄バス]]岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[大垣駅前バスのりば]]（[[大垣駅]]南）2番のりば「[[岐阜聖徳学園大学]]」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *[[岐阜乗合自動車|岐阜バス]]おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **[[JR岐阜駅バスターミナル]]（[[岐阜駅]]北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **[[名鉄岐阜のりば]]（[[名鉄岐阜駅]]西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 関連項目 == *[[結神社]] *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

Ronsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|version=107307049|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記|date=2015年3月19日 (木) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=八幡神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|墨俣町・八幡神社]]
拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}（旧{{jalink|安八郡|Q1204320}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|美濃路|Q3315566}}沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}安八郡{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は{{jalink|白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|Q11580504|白鬚神社}} 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（{{jalink|犀川 (岐阜県)|Q7399814|犀川}}河川敷）であり、{{jalink|本巣郡|Q1204331}}と安八郡の境に存在したという。 == 祭神 == *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} **{{jalink|小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|Q11462010|説経節をぐり}}によると、{{jalink|小栗判官|Q11462010}}が{{jalink|現人神|Q521834}}として祀られているという。 == 交通機関 == *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き == 関連項目 == *{{jalink|結神社|Q11606721}} *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

{{ill|Q135039898|lt=Q135039898|WD=Q135039898}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2015年3月19日 (木) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=八幡神社 | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|墨俣町・八幡神社]]
拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}（旧{{jalink|安八郡|Q1204320}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|美濃路|Q3315566}}沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}安八郡{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は{{jalink|白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|Q11580504|白鬚神社}} 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（{{jalink|犀川 (岐阜県)|Q7399814|犀川}}河川敷）であり、{{jalink|本巣郡|Q1204331}}と安八郡の境に存在したという。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} **{{jalink|小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|Q11462010|説経節をぐり}}によると、{{jalink|小栗判官|Q11462010}}が{{jalink|現人神|Q521834}}として祀られているという。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|結神社|Q11606721}} *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 === 脚注 === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]]

拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}（旧{{jalink|安八郡|Q1204320}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|美濃路|Q3315566}}沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}安八郡{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は{{jalink|白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|Q11580504|白鬚神社}} 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（{{jalink|犀川 (岐阜県)|Q7399814|犀川}}河川敷）であり、{{jalink|本巣郡|Q1204331}}と安八郡の境に存在したという。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} **{{jalink|小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|Q11462010|説経節をぐり}}によると、{{jalink|小栗判官|Q11462010}}が{{jalink|現人神|Q521834}}として祀られているという。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|結神社|Q11606721}} *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 === 脚注 === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

拝殿 | 所在地={{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}墨俣町墨俣1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} | 社格={{jalink|式内社}}論社 | 例祭=10月10日 | 創建=不明 | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=八幡神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''八幡神社'''（はちまんじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|岐阜県|Q131277}}{{jalink|大垣市|Q384926}}（旧{{jalink|安八郡|Q1204320}}{{jalink|墨俣町|Q7640962}}）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|美濃路|Q3315566}}沿いにある。西町八幡神社ともいう。 {{jalink|美濃国|Q864156}}安八郡{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932|式内社}}の荒方神社（荒方明神）の論社の一つである。もう一つの論社は{{jalink|白鬚神社 (大垣市墨俣町)|Q11580504|白鬚神社}} 。 元々の位置は現在地の北（{{jalink|犀川 (岐阜県)|Q7399814|犀川}}河川敷）であり、{{jalink|本巣郡|Q1204331}}と安八郡の境に存在したという。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997}} **{{jalink|小栗判官#説経節にみる小栗判官伝説|Q11462010|説経節をぐり}}によると、{{jalink|小栗判官|Q11462010}}が{{jalink|現人神|Q521834}}として祀られているという。 === 交通機関 === *{{jalink|名阪近鉄バス|Q11415818}}岐垣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|大垣駅前バスのりば|Q11433817}}（{{jalink|大垣駅|Q871579}}南）2番のりば「{{jalink|岐阜聖徳学園大学|Q5560125}}」「岐阜流通センター南口」行き *{{jalink|岐阜乗合自動車|Q5560101|岐阜バス}}おぶさ墨俣線「墨俣」バス停より徒歩15分 **{{jalink|JR岐阜駅バスターミナル|Q11226229}}（{{jalink|岐阜駅|Q1144885}}北）6番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き **{{jalink|名鉄岐阜のりば|Q11415771}}（{{jalink|名鉄岐阜駅|Q1109902}}西）1番のりば「W65　墨俣」行き === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|結神社|Q11606721}} *:照手姫が結神社で小栗判官と結ばれるよう願をかけ、守り本尊を奉納したという。 === 脚注 === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} | 社格=candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}} (formerly {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Anpachi District|Q1204320}}). It stands along the {{jalink|Minoji|Q3315566}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}. The other candidate shrine is {{jalink|Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|Shirahige Shrine}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{jalink|Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{jalink|Motosu District|Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} **According to {{jalink|Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{jalink|Oguri Hangan|Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{jalink|arahitogami|Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{jalink|JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{jalink|Musubu Shrine|Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Q135039898|lt=Q135039898|WD=Q135039898}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県大垣市墨俣町墨俣1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} | 社格=candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}} (formerly {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Anpachi District|Q1204320}}). It stands along the {{jalink|Minoji|Q3315566}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}. The other candidate shrine is {{jalink|Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|Shirahige Shrine}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{jalink|Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{jalink|Motosu District|Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} **According to {{jalink|Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{jalink|Oguri Hangan|Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{jalink|arahitogami|Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{jalink|JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{jalink|Musubu Shrine|Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]] [[Category:need translation]]

[[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}}{{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} | 社格=candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Ōgaki|Q384926}}, {{jalink|Gifu Prefecture|Q131277}} (formerly {{jalink|Sunomata-chō|Q7640962}}, {{jalink|Anpachi District|Q1204320}}). It stands along the {{jalink|Minoji|Q3315566}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{jalink|Mino Province|Q864156}}. The other candidate shrine is {{jalink|Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|Shirahige Shrine}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{jalink|Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{jalink|Motosu District|Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} **According to {{jalink|Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{jalink|Oguri Hangan|Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{jalink|arahitogami|Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{jalink|JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{jalink|Musubu Shrine|Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qq]]

Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{jalink|Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{jalink|Motosu District|Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997}} **According to {{jalink|Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{jalink|Oguri Hangan|Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{jalink|arahitogami|Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{jalink|Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{jalink|Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817}} (south of {{jalink|Ōgaki Station|Q871579}}), bound for "{{jalink|Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{jalink|Gifu Bus|Q5560101|Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{jalink|JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229}} (north of {{jalink|Gifu Station|Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771}} (west of {{jalink|Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{jalink|Musubu Shrine|Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:大垣市の歴史]] [[Category:美濃国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:大垣市の建築物]][[Category:qqq]]

[[JA:八幡神社 (大垣市墨俣町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11391073}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:はちまんしんしや おおかきしすのまた}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Sunomata Hachiman Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] {{出典の明記|date=19 March 2015 (Thu) 14:52 (UTC)}} {{神社 | 名称=Hachiman Shrine | 画像=[[File:Sunomata hachiman.JPG|250px|Sunomata-chō Hachiman Shrine]]
Worship hall | 所在地={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}} Sunomata-chō Sunomata 1 | 位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} | 祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} | 社格=candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} | 例祭=October 10 | 創建=unknown | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Hachiman Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōgaki|Q384926|WD=Q384926|1=Ōgaki}}, {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|WD=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}} (formerly {{ill|lt=Sunomata-chō|Q7640962|WD=Q7640962|1=Sunomata, Gifu}}, {{ill|lt=Anpachi District|Q1204320|WD=Q1204320|1=Anpachi District, Gifu}}). It stands along the {{ill|lt=Minoji|Q3315566|WD=Q3315566|1=Minoji}}. It is also called Nishimachi Hachiman Shrine. It is one of the candidate shrines for Arakata Shrine (Arakata Myōjin), a Shikinaisha in Anpachi District of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|WD=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}. The other candidate shrine is {{ill|lt=Shirahige Shrine (Sunomata-chō, Ōgaki)|Q11580504|WD=Q11580504|lt=Shirahige Shrine|1=Shirahige Shrine (Q11580504)}}. Its original location was north of the current site (the riverbed of the {{ill|lt=Sai River (Gifu)|Q7399814|WD=Q7399814|lt=Sai River|1=Sai River (Gifu)}}), and is said to have been on the border of {{ill|lt=Motosu District|Q1204331|WD=Q1204331|1=Motosu District, Gifu}} and Anpachi District. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} **According to {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan#Legend in sekkyō-bushi|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|lt=Sekkyō-bushi Oguri|1=Oguri Hangan}}, {{ill|lt=Oguri Hangan|Q11462010|WD=Q11462010|1=Oguri Hangan}} is enshrined as a {{ill|lt=arahitogami|Q521834|WD=Q521834|1=Arahitogami}}. === Transportation === *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Gikaki Line of {{ill|lt=Meihan Kintetsu Bus|Q11415818|WD=Q11415818|1=Meihan Kintetsu Bus}} **From platform 2 at {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station bus terminal|Q11433817|WD=Q11433817|1=Ōgaki Station bus terminal}} (south of {{ill|lt=Ōgaki Station|Q871579|WD=Q871579|1=Ōgaki Station}}), bound for "{{ill|lt=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University|Q5560125|WD=Q5560125|1=Gifu Shotoku Gakuen University}}" or "Gifu Ryūtsū Center South Entrance" *15 minutes on foot from "Sunomata" bus stop on the Obusa-Sunomata Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|WD=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}} **From platform 6 at {{ill|lt=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal|Q11226229|WD=Q11226229|1=JR Gifu Station Bus Terminal}} (north of {{ill|lt=Gifu Station|Q1144885|WD=Q1144885|1=Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" **From platform 1 at {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu stop|Q11415771|WD=Q11415771|1=Meitetsu Gifu stop}} (west of {{ill|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|Q1109902|WD=Q1109902|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}}), bound for "W65 Sunomata" === See also === *{{ill|lt=Musubu Shrine|Q11606721|WD=Q11606721|1=Musubu Shrine}} *:It is said that Terute-hime prayed at Musubu Shrine to be united with Oguri Hangan and offered her guardian honzon there. === Notes
